title: Dollar, US Futures Decline on Tariff Uncertainty: Markets Wrap
description: The dollar and US stock futures dropped early in Asian trading as uncertainty lingered after the Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s sweeping reciprocal tariffs and he signaled plans to impose a global levy of 15%.
content: The dollar and US stock futures dropped early in Asian trading as uncertainty lingered after the Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s sweeping reciprocal tariffs and he signaled plans to impose a global levy of 15%.
